entryType: direct entry into central hall with immediate access to main living areas
kitchenLocation: centrally located with open connection to dining area, adjacent to living room
bedroomLayout: split bedroom layout with one bedroom in upper left and one bedroom in lower left, separated by main living areas
bathroomPlacement: two full bathrooms - one ensuite to upper bedroom, one shared hall bath accessible from lower bedroom area
efficiencyNotes: open kitchen-dining-living area maximizes perceived space
back-to-back plumbing between bathrooms and laundry saves costs
compact galley-style kitchen efficient for small space
laundry room doubles as utility storage
uniqueFeatures: central refrigerator placement between kitchen and dining
angled entry hall creates interesting geometry
each bedroom has direct bathroom access
dimensionNotes: 40'-1" x 28'-0" overall footprint with bedrooms approximately 11'-2" x 8'-0" and 10'-4" x 5'-0", open living area spans approximately 23' width creating spacious feel despite compact square footage
